drawerSignInHint: Sign in to view your cart and continue to checkout.
genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.addByAmountBlockedQuantityLine: This product is already in your cart by quantity. Remove the line or continue that way — you cannot add by amount until then.
errors.addByQuantityBlockedAmountLine: This product is already in your cart by amount. Remove the line or continue that way — you cannot add by quantity until then.
errors.updateQuantityBlockedAmountLine: This line was added by amount. Adjust the amount only, or remove the item.
errors.updateAmountBlockedQuantityLine: This line is by quantity. Update quantity or remove the item to switch to by amount.

signInToAdd.message: Please sign in to add products to your cart

title: Cart

wrap.explanation: We arrange your selected vegetables and fruits in a container and wrap them in cling film, so they reach you neat, clean, fresh and protected on the way. Available only for items sold by weight (kg).
wrap.toggleLabel: Wrap this item in cling film
wrap.unavailable: Wrapping is only available for products sold by the kilogram.

purchaseByAmountNote: You chose a basket value of {{amount}}; quantity is set by the store.
